_comment: Tool 2 (get_access_instructions) source data for the Nutanix IAM pilot. Maps a system to the exact provisioning instruction. X-Bot is a Slack app; our bot INSTRUCTS the user (no automated provisioning).

systems.instructions: In Slack, type: `@X-Bot request access to Cursor`
In Slack, type: `@X-Bot request UBVM` (or say "I want a new UBVM").

There is no ServiceNow ticket for this. Set up your GitHub account via OKTA/SAML, then self-invite through the Canaveral UI: https://canaveral-ui.corp.p10y.ntnxdpro.com/#/account/github (e.g. to join orgs like nutanix-core).
TODO (confirm exact command). For a dev VM you typically start with `@X-Bot request UBVM`; for cluster-specific access, ask in #iam-help.
